arts.ttl: Exclusive: Title-rivals have now opened talks to sign Liverpool key star
arts.sum: Manchester City, Barcelona, Real Madrid and PSG are in talks to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold on a free transfer. The 26-year-old England International will be out of contract at the end of the season, and Liverpool have not been able to secure an extension with him.
